selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:

Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "Creating a personal account on social media platforms is the most effective way to handle and deal with fake information. This is because each person can control what they post and share, and they are not under pressure from others to do so. Additionally, by creating a personal account, one can take advantage of privacy settings that allow for greater control over who sees their content and information. Furthermore, many social media platforms have algorithms that prioritize content from friends and family, which reduces the likelihood of encountering fake news. Finally, by using reputable sources and fact-checking tools, one can verify the accuracy of the information they find on social media before sharing it with others."
,"reasoning_summary": "To deal with fake content on social media, a person should create their personal account on social media platforms, control what they post and share, take advantage of privacy settings for greater control over who sees their content and information, use reputable sources and fact-checking tools to verify the accuracy of the information found on social media before sharing it with others. ",

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Creating a personal account on social media platforms is the most effective way to handle and deal with fake information. This is because each person can control what they post and share, and they are not under pressure from others to do so. Additionally, by creating a personal account, one can take advantage of privacy settings that allow for greater control over who sees their content and information. Furthermore, many social media platforms have algorithms that prioritize content from friends and family, which reduces the likelihood of encountering fake news. Finally, by using reputable sources and fact-checking tools, one can verify the accuracy of the information they find on social media before sharing it with others.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To deal with fake content on social media, a person should create their personal account on social media platforms, control what they post and share, take advantage of privacy settings for greater control over who sees their content and information, use reputable sources and fact-checking tools to verify the accuracy of the information found on social media before sharing it with others.
